section.name: Alpha Notice
section.p: ⚠ This plugin is in early-phase development (alpha). APIs, configuration schemas, HST component interfaces, and JCR node types are subject to change without notice between releases. Do not treat any aspect of this plugin as stable until a non-SNAPSHOT version is published to Bloomreach Forge.

tr.td: site/components when custom code compiles against addon APIs

section.name: Step 2 - Enable CRISP broker
section.p: Add the following to the site webapp hst-config.properties:

section.name: Step 3 - Configure credentials
section.p: System properties are the fastest local-development path:
For deployed environments, prefer env vars such as BRXDIS_ACCOUNT_ID, BRXDIS_DOMAIN_KEY, and BRXDIS_API_KEY.

section.name: Step 4 - Create config node (optional)
section.p: If credentials are not coming entirely from env vars or system properties, bootstrap the global config node in HCM.

div.source: definitions: config: /hippo:configuration/hippo:modules/brxm-discovery/hippo:moduleconfig/discoveryConfig: jcr:primaryType: brxdis:discoveryConfig brxdis:accountId: 'your-account-id' brxdis:domainKey: 'your-domain-key' brxdis:apiKey: '' brxdis:defaultPageSize: 12

section.name: Step 5 - Wire a search page
section.p: The minimum working page is one data component plus view components connected by the same label / connectTo value. The data component writes results into the request cache under the label, and the view components read from that label.

div.source: definitions: config: /hst:hst/hst:configurations/<your-site>/hst:workspace/hst:pages: /search-page: jcr:primaryType: hst:component hst:referencecomponent: hst:abstractpages/base /main: jcr:primaryType: hst:component /search: jcr:primaryType: hst:containeritemcomponent hst:componentclassname: org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.site.component.DiscoverySearchComponent hst:template: brxdis-search hst:parameternames: [label, pageSize] hst:parametervalues: [default, 12] /facets: jcr:primaryType: hst:containeritemcomponent hst:componentclassname: org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.site.component.DiscoveryFacetComponent hst:template: brxdis-facets hst:parameternames: [connectTo] hst:parametervalues: [default] /grid: jcr:primaryType: hst:containeritemcomponent hst:componentclassname: org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.site.component.DiscoveryProductGridComponent hst:template: brxdis-product-grid hst:parameternames: [connectTo] hst:parametervalues: [default]
definitions: config: /hst:hst/hst:configurations/<your-site>/hst:sitemap: /search: jcr:primaryType: hst:sitemapitem hst:componentconfigurationid: hst:pages/search-page

section.name: Step 6 - Verify
section.p: Start the site webapp and open http://localhost:8080/site/search?q=shirt.
Expected output: a search form, facet sidebar, and product grid populated from the Discovery API.
Startup log lines to look for:

div.source: brxm-discovery: registered picker endpoint at /discovery/picker brxm-discovery: Registered JCR observation listener on '/hippo:configuration'

tr.td: Shared config model, defaults, and CRISP wiring.
Detailed parameter reference for search/category pages.
Search bar typeahead and suggest-only mode.
